basic_details.job_title: Kumaun University Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate II/ Project Assitant
basic_details.post_name: Junior Research Fellow / Project Associate (II) / Project Assistant
basic_details.short_information: Kumaun University is recruiting 1 position for a 5-year ANRF project (initial tenure 1 year, extendable).

important_dates.venue: Department of Chemistry, DSB Campus, Nainital

qualification.details: criteria: Details | preference: Candidates qualified in CSIR-UGC NET in Chemical Sciences | age limit: As per ANRF/GoI norms
qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Chemistry + CSIR-UGC NET (for JRF) OR M.Sc. with 2 years R&D experience OR M.Sc. (for Project Assistant)

vacancy_details.details: Total Positions: 01 Position: Junior Research Fellow / Project Associate (II) / Project Assistant

how_to_apply: Prepare application on plain paper with detailed CV.
Attach attested copies of degrees, certificates, experience, and NET scorecard.
Submit via email / post or produce at the time of interview.
Candidates must bring original documents for verification on the interview date.
Contact: Prof. Nanda Gopal Sahoo, [email protected]
important_instructions: The position is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. Initial appointment for 1 year, extendable based on performance. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Preference will be given to NET-qualified candidates. Only eligible and shortlisted candidates will be interviewed.

faq.question: Q1. What is the walk-in interview date for Kumaun University Project Position 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held on 21st July 2026 at 11:30 AM at Department of Chemistry, DSB Campus, Nainital.

faq.question: Q2. What is the qualification required for Kumaun University ANRF Project?
faq.answer: M.Sc. in Chemistry. NET qualification is preferred for Junior Research Fellow.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Junior Research Fellow at Kumaun University?
faq.answer: Emoluments are ₹37,000 + 10% HRA (for JRF) / lower for Project Associate / Assistant.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are there in Kumaun University Chemistry Project 2026?
faq.answer: Only 1 position (JRF / Project Associate-II / Project Assistant).

faq.question: Q5. What is the project duration at Kumaun University Nainital?
faq.answer: 5 Years (initial tenure of 1 year, extendable based on performance).

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for Kumaun University Project Assistant / JRF position?
faq.answer: Send application with CV and documents via email or bring at the time of walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q7. Who is the Principal Investigator for the ANRF project at Kumaun University?
faq.answer: Prof. Nanda Gopal Sahoo, PRS-NSNT Centre, Department of Chemistry.

faq.question: Q8. Is NET mandatory for Kumaun University JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: NET (CSIR-UGC) is preferred. Candidates with NET will be given preference.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job location for the Kumaun University Project Position?
faq.answer: DSB Campus, Nainital, Uttarakhand.

faq.question: Q10. Will TA/DA be provided for the interview at Kumaun University?
faq.answer: No, no TA/DA is admissible for attending the interview.
